data.content: Implementation review: 4 quality gates pass on branch ship-c4a6-impl (commit 42ebc503). All AC-B1 through AC-B5 satisfied. Hermetic test policy preserved (auto-migration test mocks fs). Fail-loud policy preserved (no silent fallbacks introduced). Code style: agent-identity.ts split to keep under 500-line limit (extracted agent-identity-canonical.ts). Test file split similarly. Audit grep #2 returns zero unsanctioned hits when run with the documented sanctioned-files filter (agent-identity.ts, agent-identity-canonical.ts, agent-config-normalization.ts excluded since these are the canonical extractors and write-side normalizer).
